# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.
# Category: xss

module PostsHelper
  # Centralized sanitization configuration for consistent security
  ALLOWED_POST_TAGS = %w[
    p br h2 h3 h4 h5 h6 strong em b i u s strike
    a img ul ol li blockquote pre code hr
    table thead tbody tr th td
    div span sub sup figure figcaption
  ].freeze

  ALLOWED_POST_ATTRIBUTES = %w[
    href src alt title class id target rel
    width height colspan rowspan
  ].freeze

  ALLOWED_COMMENT_TAGS = %w[p br strong em b i u a code pre blockquote].freeze
  ALLOWED_COMMENT_ATTRIBUTES = %w[href title target rel].freeze

  def safe_post_content(content)
    sanitize(content, tags: ALLOWED_POST_TAGS, attributes: ALLOWED_POST_ATTRIBUTES)
  end

  def safe_comment_content(content)
    sanitize(content, tags: ALLOWED_COMMENT_TAGS, attributes: ALLOWED_COMMENT_ATTRIBUTES)
  end

  def safe_post_excerpt(content, length: 300)
    sanitize(
      truncate(content, length: length, escape: false),
      tags: %w[p br strong em b i],
      attributes: []
    )
  end
end
